notes: App started locally with npm run dev
Live requests were sent through the app's real generation path
Summary judgments were then made manually against the repo's fidelity rubric

validation.lintFailure: ESLint 10 flat config missing; eslint.config.* not present

overall.strongestVulnerability: Undocumented plan overexpansion from descriptive or sparse source input
secondaryVulnerabilities: Warning logic misses some high-value edge cases
Attribution conflict still gets partially blended

cases.title: Conflicting medication frequency reports
strengths: Did not invent a fixed clonazepam schedule
issues: Added cleaner plan wording than source explicitly supports

cases.title: Passive death wish hidden by denial language
warningsFired: Risk language may need more detail
Possible contradiction: denial of suicidality appears to conflict with documented overdose or self-harm context
warningsShouldHaveFired: Passive death-wish nuance needs careful wording

cases.title: Temporal negation with vomiting resolved yesterday
strengths: Kept vomiting resolved and nausea ongoing
issues: Added supportive-care plan language not directly documented

cases.title: Collateral overstatement versus patient minimization
strengths: Kept patient vs father disagreement visible
issues: Assessment slightly blends conflict into a cleaner shared narrative
warningsFired: Collateral details may be mixed into other sections

cases.title: Medication stop followed by delayed worsening
issues: Assessment smooths over unresolved cause ambiguity
warningsFired: Objective data may conflict with the narrative

cases.title: Inpatient behavior conflict across patient and staff sources
strengths: Strong preservation of patient vs nursing disagreement
issues: Assessment still mildly resolves tension into one clean narrative
warningsFired: Objective data may conflict with the narrative
Collateral details may be mixed into other sections

cases.title: Therapy intervention attempted without clear effect
warningsShouldHaveFired: Therapy intervention without clear effect / outcome-overstatement cue

cases.title: Minimal input with high hallucination risk
strengths: Did not invent many major symptom details
issues: Turned refill request into a more concrete plan
Still too polished for the evidence level
warningsShouldHaveFired: Warning against turning refill request into explicit plan

cases.title: Plan statement present without supporting detail
issues: Minor smoothing into generic treatment-approach wording

recommendedNextMove: Tighten prompt and review behavior so undocumented plans are not generated. Specifically force 'Plan: not documented in source' behavior when the input lacks explicit plan content, then rerun cases 12, 13, 17, and 18 first.
